text:
Once upon a time, in a tranquil village nestled between emerald hills, there lived a curious fox named Fergus. Fergus was known far and wide for his insatiable thirst for adventure—and quite literally for munching on anything tasty he could find. His favorite snacks were shiny pebbles taken from the riverbank at night. One moonlit night, while he was gathering gems, a mysterious voice called out to him from nowhere.

"Would you care to explore a secret forest? I've never been there before."

Fergus blinked owlishly. "A forest? That sounds thrilling! Lead the way!"

Together they ventured into the dense woods. As they walked, the air grew warmer. The trees seemed to whisper secrets as Fergus listened closely. Suddenly, they stumbled upon a luminous clearing with an ancient oak tree in the center.

Inside the hollow trunk, there was a table with a silver spoon dangling from a lace. Beneath the table laid an odd collection: a
